summary: M422 — Damage Report tool page (/assets/damage-report.html): per-class damage/healing/mitigation graphed across levels (1,3,5,7,10,15,20,25,30) × {single,AoE} × {solo,group}. Multi-class overlay (per-color), milestone comparison (solid vs dotted), role filter. Snapshot generator at scripts/damage-report-snapshot.mjs (~1080 sims/run). Baseline M422 snapshot included.
